text:
> >Synopsis:       gtk+ builds, but does not install correctly
> >Environment:
> FreeBSD st-lcremean.tidalwave.net 2.2.5-STABLE FreeBSD 2.2.5-STABLE #5:

Um, I'll suggest that it might be that your bsd.port.mk is out of date.
Try grabbing the latest version and see if that fixes things.  Since we're
about ready to release 2.2.7, you are a bit behind.

Brett
